[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100010010 3
1 0010000000 1
2 0011110011 6
3 1101100111 7
4 0000101101 4
5 0011100101 5
6 1101110110 7
7 1111111111 a
